route.name: Over the Rainbow
route.description:
This is a Dirty Freehub "5 Star" gravel route, meaning that it meets our standards for being a great route to ride! For more information on this route go to dirtyfreehub.com/rainbow

Map Legend:
Red = paved roads
Brown = gravel / dirt roads
Purple = Roubaix

Cue Sheet Legend:
Pvd = paved road
Grvl = gravel / dirt road
Rbx = Roubaix style road (i.e. broken pavement, possibly short gravel sections)
Sgl Tx = single track mountain biking trail
Dbl Tx = double track mountain biking trail

-------------------------------------------------------------
Share with Integrity. Please read before sharing: DirtyFreehub.com/integrity

The content within this route (course, elevation profile, customized cue sheet, and color mapping) was created by the DirtyFreehub.com team.

© 2018 Dirty Freehub

course_points.n: Turn right onto NE Coleman Rd.
